rules.summary: Ad/warranty document uses 'warranty' wording — must also state that this does not affect the consumer's other rights under the ACL, otherwise may be misleading (the engine only triggers when 'warranty'/保修 wording appears; whether ACL disclosure is complete requires manual review)

rules.summary_en: Ad/warranty document uses 'warranty' wording — must also state that this does not affect the consumer's other rights under the ACL, otherwise may be misleading (the engine only triggers when 'warranty'/保修 wording appears; whether ACL disclosure is complete requires manual review)

rules.summary: Ad displays the TISI/มอก. certification mark or claims compliance with a national standard — vacuum cleaners are currently a voluntary standard while rice cookers/electric fans/irons are mandatory standards; reminder to verify the actual classification of this SKU and not imply mandatory certification for a voluntary category. rules.summary_en: Ad displays the TISI/มอก. certification mark or claims compliance with a national standard — vacuum cleaners are currently a voluntary standard while rice cookers/electric fans/irons are mandatory standards; reminder to verify the actual classification of this SKU and not imply mandatory certification for a voluntary category. Tool cannot verify SKU classification. Non-blocking reminder.

citation.article: BPJPH认证要求 — 未经核实的清真/Halal宣称须核实认证状态

rules.summary_zh: 广告使用清真/Halal/BPJPH宣称，工具无法核实认证状态，需人工核实BPJPH证书有效性后再发布。非文案改写可解决事项。

rules.summary: 涉及疗效、收益保证的绝对化表达，未经证实即在广告中作出保证性陈述，属CCPA 2022年防止误导性广告指引明确规制的高风险宣称，不是补证据就能过关的事项

citation.law_name: Consumer Protection Act 2019 第21条 + CCPA《2022年防止误导性广告及代言指引》
citation.article: 第21条 — 误导性广告处罚机制；指引第4条 — 有效且不误导广告判断标准

rules.summary_en: Absolute efficacy or return-guarantee claims (e.g. '100% guaranteed', 'guaranteed cure', 'risk-free returns') are prohibited under CCPA 2022 Guidelines on Prevention of Misleading Advertisements — not curable by adding disclaimers or evidence.
rules.summary_zh: 绝对化疗效或收益保证宣称（如「100%有效」「保证治愈」「无风险收益」）属CCPA 2022年指引明确规制的高风险宣称，无法通过补充声明或证据通过。
